description: Phishing templates impersonating electronic signature platforms

templates.name: DocuSign NDA Signature Request
suggested_subject_lines: Action Required: Document awaiting your signature
DocuSign: Legal & Compliance Team sent you a document
templates.notes: NDA context works across industries. 48-hour expiry adds urgency without seeming implausible.

templates.name: Adobe Acrobat Sign Employment Amendment
suggested_subject_lines: Adobe Sign: Signature required — Employment Agreement
Action required: Please sign your document
HR has sent you a document via Adobe Acrobat Sign
templates.notes: HR context creates authority. Employment amendment is plausible for any employee.
